title: tengine.session.biome_palette_loaded v1
description: Fires at silo startup reporting the static biome palette registry size. Producer: registry handle BIOME_PALETTE_LOADED in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs.

palette_count.description: Number of biome entries in the static biome palette registry.

biome_ids.description: Identifiers of the registered biomes, in registry order.
